case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION VS. FLORETTA WORTHY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $91.50 SERVED AUG-13-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WORTHY, FLORETTA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO NOV-14-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILATION, REPRESENTED BY TYLER HOLLINGSWORTH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FLORETTA WORTHY IS PRESENT AND WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TYLER HOLLINGSWORTH. DEFENDANT FLORETTA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT AWARE THAT A CORPORATION HAS A $5000 LIMIT IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT AND ALLOWED THE JUDGE PRO TEM DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO ALLOR FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE BY PLAINTIFF. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV-14-2019 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
